overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy mountain landscape. The character traverses a dirt path, ascends ancient stone steps, and follows a ridge overlooking a misty mountain lake in a winter setting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a winding dirt path through a snowy forest with weapons on back

entered.detail: tall mountain peak covered in snow visible through the trees ahead
dense pine trees lining the left side of the path
dense pine trees lining the right side of the path
narrow dirt path winding through the forest with patches of snow
narrow stream running parallel to the path on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense evergreen forest. Snow-capped mountains are visible in the distance ahead, while a small creek runs alongside the path to the right. The environment is quiet and empty, with winter snow covering the ground.

events.description: dirt trail transitions to man-made stone steps with retaining walls

agents.ego_description: climbing weathered stone steps built into the mountainside, flanked by stone walls

entered.detail: ancient stone steps built into the mountain slope
low stone retaining wall lining the left side of the stairs
low stone retaining wall lining the right side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The path transforms into a stone staircase ascending the mountain, flanked by weathered stone walls. The dense forest recedes to the sides as the character climbs higher, with the snow-capped mountain peak remaining visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge with panoramic lake view

events.description: reaching the ridge crest, the view opens up to reveal a large mountain lake below

agents.ego_description: descending stone steps toward the lakeshore with expansive views of the water and distant mountains

entered.detail: large body of water visible below the ridge, surrounded by forested mountains
leafless dead trees standing near the lakeshore
snow-dusted rocky terrain rising on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the ridge crest, the landscape opens dramatically to reveal a vast mountain lake below. The character descends toward the water along stone steps, passing dead trees and rocky outcrops, with misty mountains framing the background.

agents.ego_description: walking along the lakeshore path with the water visible to the left and forested slopes to the right

entered.detail: rocky edge of the lake meeting the path
dense pine forest returning on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a dirt trail at the lake's edge, with the rocky shoreline immediately to the left and dense evergreen forest to the right. The path follows the water's contour through the misty mountain valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded evergreen forest up a mountain ridge and down toward a misty lakeside valley. It begins along a narrow dirt trail beside a small creek, with snow-capped peaks looming in the distance through the dense winter woods. As the terrain steepens, the dirt path transforms into a weathered stone staircase that ascends the mountain, causing the forest to recede as the character climbs higher toward the summit. Upon reaching the ridge crest, the landscape opens dramatically to reveal a vast mountain lake below, leading the camera down a series of stone steps past dead trees and rocky outcrops. The scene finally shifts to a dirt trail at the water's edge, following the rocky shoreline and the contour of the misty valley with the evergreen forest returning to the right.
